PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\qkangber\\app -Recurse -Force | Where-Object {$_.PSIsContainer -or $_.Extension -in @\('.tsx', '.ts', '.jsx', '.js'\)} | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('sha',''\)\); import base64; print\(base64.b64decode\(d.get\('content',''\)\).decode\('utf-8','replace'\)[:2000]\)")

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content D:\\qkangber\\.env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match "^GOOGLE_SHEETS_API_KEY=" }\) -replace "GOOGLE_SHEETS_API_KEY=", ""; $id = \(Get-Content D:\\qkangber\\.env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match "^GOOGLE_SHEET_ID=" }\) -replace "GOOGLE_SHEET_ID=", ""; $url = "https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/$id/values/posts!A2:N5?key=$key"; $data = \(Invoke-WebRequest $url\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($row in $data.values\) { Write-Output "slug=$\($row[0]\) | category=$\($row[12]\) | coverImage=$\($row[13]\)" })
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\('public/logo.png'\); print\(img.size, img.mode\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\qkangber -Force -Filter ".env*" | Select-Object Name; "---"; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\qkangber -Force -Filter "*.env" -Recurse -Depth 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(npx next lint --file app/newsletter/archive/page.tsx --file components/page-hero/PageHero.tsx 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($html = Get-Content 'D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\03-ai-coding-downsides\\03-ai-coding-downsides.html' -Raw; $text = \($html -replace '<[^>]+>', ''\) -replace '\\s+', ''; "字數: $\($text.Length\)"; if \($html -match '一個晚上做出三個'\) {'⚠ 仍有瞎掰句'} else {'✅ 瞎掰句已移除'}; if \($html -match '缺點一：'\) {'⚠ 仍有怪H2'} else {'✅ 怪H2已修'})

PowerShell($f='D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\03-ai-coding-downsides\\03-ai-coding-downsides.html'; $html = Get-Content $f -Raw; $text = \($html -replace '<[^>]+>', ''\) -replace '\\s+', ''; "字數: $\($text.Length\)"; "figure 數: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html,'<figure>'\)\).Count; "本地路徑 img\(應為0\): " + \([regex]::Matches\($html,'src="images/'\)\).Count; "AICommand 出現次數: " + \([regex]::Matches\($html,'AICommand'\)\).Count; "img 網址:"; [regex]::Matches\($html,'src="\(https://i\\.ibb\\.co/[^"]+\)"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value })

PowerShell(try { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop; $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "dev server stopped" } catch { "no listener on 3000 \(already stopped\)" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\qkangber -Recurse -Filter "page.tsx" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules" } | Select-Object -First 20 FullName)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\06-claude-code-web-design\\images\\03-send-to-claude-code.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(1000, 0, 516, 240\); $crop = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(516, 240\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($crop\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,516,240\)\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\check-annotation.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $crop.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); "saved")

PowerShell($urls = @\('https://aiqkangber.com/blog/claude-mcp','https://aiqkangber.com/blog/ai-coding-downsides','https://aiqkangber.com/contact','https://support.claude.com/en/articles/11647753-how-do-usage-and-length-limits-work','https://support.claude.com/en/articles/14667344-claude-design-subscription-usage-and-pricing','https://www.hot3c.com/read.asp?class=22&id=27113'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 5 -TimeoutSec 20 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "{0} -> {1}" -f $u, $r.StatusCode } catch { "{0} -> ERROR {1}" -f $u, $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ } })

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "D:\\qkangber\\.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^IMGBB_API_KEY=' }\) -replace '^IMGBB_API_KEY=',''; $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\06-claude-code-web-design\\cover.jpg"\)\); $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.imgbb.com/1/upload?key=$key" -Method Post -Body @{ image = $b64; name = "06-claude-code-web-design-cover" }; $resp.data.url)

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "D:\\qkangber\\.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^IMGBB_API_KEY=' }\) -replace '^IMGBB_API_KEY=',''; $dir = "D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\06-claude-code-web-design\\images"; $files = @\('01-ai-samey-layouts.png','06-ai-slop-six-styles.png','setup-design-system.png','02-claude-design-canvas.png','dribbble-reference.png','03-send-to-claude-code.png','04-before-ai-generic.png','05-after-aiqkangber.png'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$dir\\$f"\)\); $name = "claude-design-" + \($f -replace '\\.png$',''\); $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.imgbb.com/1/upload?key=$key" -Method Post -Body @{ image = $b64; name = $name }; "{0} => {1}" -f $f, $resp.data.url })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://aiqkangber.com/blog/claude-design" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "{0} | {1} bytes" -f $r.StatusCode, $r.RawContentLength; \($r.Content -match 'AI 味'\) ? "內文關鍵字 OK" : "內文沒看到關鍵字（可能有快取）")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://aiqkangber.com/blog/claude-design" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $c = $r.Content; "HTTP {0}" -f $r.StatusCode; "title 含主關鍵字: " + \($c -match 'Claude Design 協同設計'\); "琥珀重點色: " + \($c -match '#fbbf24'\); "殘留紅字: " + \($c -match '#c0392b'\); "ImgBB 內文圖: " + \([regex]::Matches\($c, 'i\\.ibb\\.co'\).Count\); "殘留本地圖路徑: " + \($c -match 'src="images/'\); "FAQ: " + \($c -match '常見問題 FAQ'\); "結尾 contact CTA 已砍: " + \(-not \($c -match '直接聯絡我'\)\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\comfyfile\\output\\ComfyUI_00048_.png"\); $enc = [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageCodecInfo]::GetImageEncoders\(\) | Where-Object { $_.MimeType -eq 'image/jpeg' }; $p = New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameters\(1\); $p.Param[0] = New-Object System.Drawing.Imaging.EncoderParameter\([System.Drawing.Imaging.Encoder]::Quality, [long]90\); $src.Save\("D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\06-claude-code-web-design\\cover.jpg", $enc, $p\); $src.Dispose\(\); $key = \(Get-Content "D:\\qkangber\\.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^IMGBB_API_KEY=' }\) -replace '^IMGBB_API_KEY=',''; $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\qkangber\\blog-drafts\\06-claude-code-web-design\\cover.jpg"\)\); $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.imgbb.com/1/upload?key=$key" -Method Post -Body @{ image = $b64; name = "claude-design-cover-v2" }; $resp.data.url)

PowerShell(node -e "import\('playwright'\).then\(async \({chromium}\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\(\); const p = await b.newPage\({viewport:{width:390,height:844}, deviceScaleFactor:2, isMobile:true, hasTouch:true}\); const pages=[['https://aiqkangber.com/','fold-home'],['https://aiqkangber.com/services','fold-services'],['https://aiqkangber.com/blog','fold-blog'],['https://aiqkangber.com/about','fold-about'],['https://aiqkangber.com/contact','fold-contact'],['https://aiqkangber.com/newsletter','fold-newsletter']]; for \(const [u,f] of pages\){ await p.goto\(u,{waitUntil:'networkidle'}\); await p.waitForTimeout\(2000\); await p.screenshot\({path:'.rwd-audit/'+f+'.png'}\); console.log\('OK',f\);} await b.close\(\); }\)")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "dev server \(PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)\) 已關閉" } else { "port 3000 沒有監聽程序" })
